Package org.springdoc.core.service

Class OpenAPIService

java.lang.Object
org.springdoc.core.service.OpenAPIService
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.beans.factory.Aware, org.springframework.context.ApplicationContextAware
public class OpenAPIService extends Object implements org.springframework.context.ApplicationContextAware
The type Open api builder.
Author:
bnasslahsen, zdary

  • Constructor Details

    • OpenAPIService

      public OpenAPIService(Optional<io.swagger.v3.oas.models.OpenAPI> openAPI, SecurityService securityParser, SpringDocConfigProperties springDocConfigProperties, PropertyResolverUtils propertyResolverUtils, Optional<List<OpenApiBuilderCustomizer>> openApiBuilderCustomizers, Optional<List<ServerBaseUrlCustomizer>> serverBaseUrlCustomizers, Optional<JavadocProvider> javadocProvider)
      Instantiates a new Open api builder.
      Parameters:
      openAPI - the open api
      securityParser - the security parser
      springDocConfigProperties - the spring doc config properties
      propertyResolverUtils - the property resolver utils
      openApiBuilderCustomizers - the open api builder customisers
      serverBaseUrlCustomizers - the server base url customizers
      javadocProvider - the javadoc provider

    • getWebhooks

      public io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.Webhooks[] getWebhooks(Class<?>[] classes)
      Gets webhooks from given classes.
      Parameters:
      classes - Array of classes to scan for webhooks.
      Returns:
      An array of Webhooks annotations found in the given classes.

    • getWebhooksClasses

      public Class<?>[] getWebhooksClasses()
      Retrieves all classes related to webhooks. This method scans for classes annotated with Webhooks or Webhook, first checking Spring-managed beans and then falling back to classpath scanning if no annotated beans are found.
      Returns:
      An array of classes related to webhooks.

      public boolean isAutoTagClasses(io.swagger.v3.oas.models.Operation operation)

      the boolean
